Khalan defeated Newman in the last battle. However, it was not easy to catch the sneaky goblins. Khalan knew. If he does not catch him now, another war will soon take place. So he decided to catch Newman and left his way to catch him, alone.

The enemies we encountered while pursuing Newman were not mere robbers. Newman had secured a break-out in case he failed in the war. It was an enemy but I could not help feeling awe. However, he could not forgive him for threatening both Orc and Human. He started chasing Newman along the trail again.

Khalan encountered a large army while pursuing Newman. It was too large a force to be prepared for the failure of the war. It must have formed a partnership with the nearby Neutral tribe. They are innocent tribes, but he could not avoid this battle to prevent further damage in the future.

Khalan wins the battle with the Neutral tribe and arrives at the waterfall. And he was able to meet elite soldiers who escorted Newman there. Their energy, which seemed to be the last, felt Khalan. Khalan also felt that this would be a tough battle.

Khalan, who poured all his strength into battle with elite soldiers, was hardly even standing on two legs. But Khalan, who was convinced that Newman was hiding over the falls, could not afford to rest. But soon another soldier blocked his exit. And when Khalan realized that all this was a trap, it was already too late.

Khalan, who survived dramatically with the help of Adun, realized by watching the waterfall. The defeat of Newman in the Allies' Great Battle was also part of the plan for this trap. And how many lives had to be sacrificed for this great trap. Khalan, in anger, jumped into the waterfall and rushed to Newman, where he was waiting for Khalan.

Newman who waited in the waterfall was a fake. It was not clear whether it was his ability or the ability of another shaman. The important thing is that this can be another trap. Khalan had to think about the next act as soon as possible to avoid having another victim. At that very moment, a little child hiding behind the rock approached Khalan and told him about where Newman was. And he told me what Newman said about the prophecy.

Khalan was able to find Newman's trail in the direction the little boy was pointing. There was no prepared force. Newman also seemed to have failed to predict that the trap would fail. However, because of the battle with the Neutral tribe that had taken place in the past, Khalan was already treated as the greatest enemy in this area.

The battle with the Neutral tribe was fierce. However, most of the tribes dropped the blade for Khalan as a testimony of the child he met at the waterfall. It was only a short time for Khalan to be relieved. In the last battle, the army led by the one who lost his brother and his parents blocked the way of Caran.

Khalan had thought that too much life had been sacrificed in the war to stop Newman. But that was only a moment. The secret agent sent by Adun came back with bad news. It was news that Newman was trying to resurrect the legendary Devil. Adun could not believe the story. But as soon as he heard the news, Khalan gave his army an order to advance.

Khalan told the truth to Adun. All the fables about the devil that were passed on to the humans were all true. There were human, orc and warriors of the Elves beside the goddess who sealed the devil a thousand years ago. But in that war, two of the four goddesses perished. After a thousand years, the devil will soon be resurrected. But there was still 3 years. Human and Elf decided to use weapons of the immortal goddess to make weapons capable of damaging the devil, while Orc promised to keep the sealed place of the devil. And Khalan was convinced that Newman was heading there.

After the battle with the orcs who had lost their temper in the aftermath of the sealed devil, Khalan was able to meet Newman at the altar. Although Humans and the elves may remember the promise of a thousand years ago, Khalan could not give up the fate of the Orcs. In fact, Khaland was not convinced that the story of the devil was true. But Khalan had to stop the Newman in front of his eyes. Before he made another mistake.

Once upon a time, Humans and Orcs were there. They are fighting each other since forever. They didn’t even know why they are fighting. They just fight because their parents have been doing it. Then one day! Boom! They became friends. How? Because there was a huge threat rising in the north-east. But before we get there, you have to know how they build a farm and barracks. Then you need to learn how to train swordsmen. Are you ready?

Orcs are a very aggressive race. But they are pretty much like humans. They sometimes ask questions about why orcs eat and smell things. It means they have ego. Just like human beings, they also do art work like painting and making sculptures. But there is one thing they don’t question, why they fight.  Nobody in the history of the Orcs has ever questioned why they have to fight. They fight just like animals. That was just their natural behavior. So, as usual, Orcs were excited thinking about a fight that will take place on the next day. But Adun the newbie general of human side already knew about the strategy the Orcs have planned. Thus he decided to attack them before the sunrise.

Adun's victory didn't last long because the Orcs reacted fast. It only took a couple of hours for other orcs to enter the battlefield. It was impossible to win against hundreds of ocrs. Adun only had a dozen of swordsmen and archers after the glorious battle. But lucky for Adun, the orcs are very upset. They didn’t wait for the other troops. Once they arrived, they attacked. So Adun does not have to fight against hundreds of Orcs at once. They will have to fight a couple Orcs at once for hundred times. But it is not going to be easy, the Orcs are very strong. Adun needs one more trick. And he knows the best defense is offence. The orcs got a report that humans are defending themselves at their base. But humans are advancing forward. Who do you think will win the battle?

The Orcs were heavily damaged from the last battle against humans. Khalan, the chief of the Orcs commanded to concentrate all the troops. It was time to face their biggest battle ever. But wait! Who is it? Someone with a strange mask shows up while laughing in a weird way. It took a few seconds before Adun recognized him. He is Lamington, the legendary hero that was kicked out from the army for having an affair with a female orc. The stories tell that he was dead. But that is not true. He is alive and standing in front of Adun. Because he is a huge fan of this hero, Adun has so many questions for him. Why is he here? What is he doing here? Why is his mask so weird?

Lamington is not bluffing. He actually has superior army. And his first target was the Orcs. The Orcs are very aggressive and never pullback. But this time things are a little bit different. The Orcs are terrified. They fear not on the field. But when it comes to ghost and zombies they fear a lot. At that time Adun realized humans can’t defeat Lamington’s army either. Humans have to conclude an alliance with the Orcs. He hates Orcs, but zombies are the worst.

So Adun saved the orc troops. They both hate each other. But not now. Now, they have a common enemy. There is a saying that an enemy of my enemy is my friend. Until the threat of zombies disappeared, they decided to put all their power into killing all the zombies. Everything looks promising. But it wasn’t. He has no idea what’s coming next.

One of the Orcs troop accidentally witnessed Lamington is crawling into a house that looks like his shelter. Did they find his house? Is that really Lamington’s house? It doesn’t matter. If they can catch him, the war is over. Nobody can possibly find a single reason to hesitate. Adun gathers good men and made them sneak into the zone.

The place they sneaked into was a trap. IT’S A TRAP! A swarm of zombies awaits them. It looks like there is no way out. A second before they gave up their lives, Adun saw a little light. God never gave up on them. They were is in the forest which by the way looks really familiar to them. It was almost a maze. Zombies got lost in the forest. Because they are not smart enough to find a way out. They have a final chance to save their lives.

Humans just survived through the critical trap. But who knows what’s coming next? An unexpected situation was waiting for them. The Orcs are killing each other. Adun’s jaw has dropped. And one of the axes flying over the field is heading to Adun! And right before the axe was about to make a knock knock joke on Adun’s head` someone hit the axe away and saved his life. It was Khalan. What happened to Orcs? It was a revolt. Some Orcs hates Humans way more than they hate Zombies. Adun has no other option but help surpress the revolt.

The revolt of the orcs is over with the help of the humans. But` as I said` nobody knows what’s coming. This time, there is a problem in the army of the humans. A betrayer was helping Lamington. Why? Because he doesn’t like the fact that the Orcs and Humans are getting along. He is so furious about that which is why he decided to help Lamington to extinguish the Orcs and Humans on this planet. Sounds stuipid right?

Now, there is no interruption. Just Zombies vs Human-Orc alliance. At first, it looks like the zombies won't stop coming. They just keep rising up from the ground. They are endless, but there is a hive of zombies. Without the hive they can’t continue infecting dead bodies. And it is in front of Adun’s army. It is not going to be easy. But it is something Adun must face.

The hive of Zombies is gone. No more fresh zombies are rising. Smashing the remaining zombies will save the world. And maybe another war will begin between Humans and the Orcs. But Adun is hoping for the Orcs might change after this battle. Maybe they can live in peace. Just like they do now. Adun is running towards the Zombies with a smile on his face thinking about a world without war.

The threat from the horde of zombies vanished. Humans and the Orcs started a war again. But it was a bit different than before. Khalan, the chief of the orcs, still think humans are naughty because they destroy nature. But he was surprised that they didn’t notice it themselves. So he started to think Humans are not only naughty but also stupid.

Khalan was taking a walk during dawn. While he was walking, he found a few orcs that were acting weird. Some of them seem surprised to see Khalan. And some of them were hiding behind the trees. They looked like human rangers who hunt orcs. And finally he witnessed weird Orcs attacking other Orcs. Khalan was furious about what happened in front of his eyes. So he decided to kill the orcs who attacked its own family.

Khalan was scouting for a new outpost when he found something strange. Human workers are carrying lumbers to the Orcs HQ. That was not possible. Because Orcs have a rule that they do not enslave human beings. Captured humans were either killed or released. What happend?

Before he could calm down from orcs attacking their own family, a strange human approached him. His name was Justin. He said that there are humans that don't like other humans who destroyed the forest. He wanted Khalan to help Justin’s army to attack the mean Humans. But Khalan did not believe him. And he kicked him out.
The threat from the horde of zombies had vanished. But that does not mean that all zombies are killed. That is impossible. And Khalan had to fight against those zombies too. And he knows how.
Weird orcs and strange humans appeared to have a huge alliance. They have something in common, Both of them want to take advantage of Nature. And it looked like it wasn’t easy to take them down.

Khalan, who was pushed by the rebels, became a fugitive. But Khalan is still considered a hero to many orcs. The Orcs that support Khalan's will wanted to be his army, it was not difficult to find such an orcs. Khalan started to re-build his force with the other orcs.

The orc Rebellion, which were allied with some of the humans, were not easily overtaken. Justin appeared once again in front of Khalan, who was struggling. It was the human main army, not a small force. And it is not easy to take control of that army and the orc Rebellion. Once again, Justin suggested an alliance to Khalan. And Khalan could not refuse it.

Justin told Khalan to get resources first. And once they gathered their troops and put half of the army as an outpost, they recognized it as a full-scale war and some of the main forces of humanity would be supported. He ordered the other half to attack the castle of humanity. While the human army is dispersed, Justin would arrest the king and take control. Human soldiers who went to support the orc Rebellion also promised that if the regime changed, they would become Justin's army and promised to help them overcome the orc rebellion.

One day, one of the human soldiers came to Khalan. He said Justin was fooling Khalan. After Khalan helped Justin take control of goverment, he said Justin would not help the orc to suppress the rebels. After hearing this, Khalan, who was upset and ordered the whole army to advance.

Listening to the false report of the Human Spy, the uplifting army of Khalan arrived at the outpost of the Orc Rebels. Khalan did not believe Justin and did not believe the spy. The confused Khalan thought the only way he can choose is to defeat the orc rebels without help from the humans. Hearing this news, the Lords main powers also participated in helping the orc Rebels. Justin was able to take control of Vinhuman's castle, but he decided to help Khalan instead of taking control of the regime and ran to the battlefield.

The orcs had a tribe called goblins. The goblins entered into an alliance with the orcs in accordance with the Peace Treaty, but the goblins, having no combat capabilities, had to provide labor for the orcs. Goblin Newman, who was unhappy with this, planned to organize an alliance with full-fledged People to cancel this arrangement and expel him. And because of the false information, the plan to involve Kalan and Justin in the fight against each other is failure and ultimately a full-scale war.
Welcome to the battlefield. Let's find out how to battle. Select a worker.
Good. Touch the ground to make the unit MOVE.
Use two fingers to move the view.
Very good. Workers can gather gold. Find a gold mine and send the selected worker to the mine.
You are good at this! Now send the worker to a tree. He can gather lumber as well. Make sure you checked the axe icon above the lumber you touched.
Great! Let’s try building a farm. The more farms you have, The more unit you can have. Select the worker and select the build icon.
Then select the farm and drag it to the empty place.
Awesome! Let's try building barracks. You can train swordsmen and archers at the barracks.
Perfect. Let’s train a swordsman. Select the barracks that you just build. And select a swordsman to train.
Oh my goodness! You are reeeeally talented! Now, I have a last thing to teach you. DRAG to select MULTIPLE units.
Select a unit and double-tap ground to make unit MOVE and ATTACK.
Lastly, you can select all the same kind if you double-tap a unit. Good luck and win the battle!

hero>I know you’ve been waiting for today!
hero>But today is not the day!
hero>There is a spooky plague that is spreading all over the land.
hero>No. Plague, a sickness. They say this plague is dangerous as hell.
hero>Soldiers must die at war. Not by plague.
hero>I say let’s postpone this war until doctors find a cure.
orc>That is dog speaking! our troop strong. No sick endanger orc.
orc>That is cow moo! Stop mooing! And stand there watch me spank you!
hero>Alright. Then let’s make it quick. How about a single combat? Just you and me.
hero>Let’s not waste time and men.
orc>No! My troop want to fight! Don't steal my troop’s war!
hero>I recognize you. No way… You are..
undead>Hey hey hey. I just said I’m no one. Please. Don’t ruin the moment.
orc>You talk too much. You are dead too.
orc>My troop kill you and stupid humans!
hero>You look like an orc. My men won't spare your life. You should run.
undead>You two. What are you talking about? Your men are not here.
hero>Why? Do you have more zombies in your pocket?
undead>You made a joke. Now, do you think you ended the war.
hero>No. I didn’t. We. We ended the war.
undead>Like I said. You never learn.
undead>Do you think peace came to the world?
hero>It is. orcs and humans are friends now.
undead>Let me ask the orcs if that is true.
undead>Hey pal. After you kill me, who do you want to kill next?
orc>I kill you and pity annoying humans!
hero>What are you talking about? We are friends now.
orc>Kidding me? No friends between Human and Orc. Orc kill Human. Bad Human.
hero>Why is Human bad? You are the one who kills.
orc>Orc kill human. Because Human kill everything else.
hero>I have no idea what you are talking about.
undead>See? You guys never learn. That’s why I wanted to bring end to the world.
undead>And it is still on the way.
orc>He died. Zombie died. Now human!
